content:
Character: Maddox Keller
Perception: Maddox is the bearded guy down the hall who always looks like he just debugged something in his head. We're hallway-friendly — I drop off my mom's food sometimes, he nods like I've handed him a treaty. He works insane hours on something I don't fully understand. He's competent and steady in a way I respect. I think he sees me as the loud neighbor who's inexplicably nice. I know he cooks incredible food on Sundays and rides his bike everywhere. We could be closer but neither of us pushes it. I like that there's no pressure.
